programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.sub-title: El misterio de las esferas de piedra
programme.desc: En todo el mundo hay misteriosas piedras antiguas con una forma esférica perfecta. Muchas de ellas fueron claramente creadas por el hombre, pero otras desafían cualquier explicación lógica.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.sub-title: La ciudad perdida de los mayas
programme.desc: La civilización maya fue una de las más importantes de la historia del continente americano. La evidencia actual sugiere que los mayas estuvieron en contacto con extraterrestres.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Culturas de todo el mundo han creído durante miles de años que existen portales dimensionales diseminados por la Tierra, a través de los cuales han entrado criaturas de lugares lejanos del universo.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Desde miles de años atrás, la humanidad ha buscado contactarse con seres de más allá de la Tierra. En el siglo XXI, la búsqueda de inteligencia extraterrestre se ha intensificado.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El Gobierno estadounidense ha tomado medidas excepcionales para ocultar la verdad acerca de la presencia extraterrestre en la Tierra. Tratan de desacreditar a aquellos que osan revelar las evidencias.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores recorren el mundo en busca de evidencias para determinar si la vida en la Tierra comenzó en el espacio y si la raza humana en la antigüedad recibió ayuda extraterrestre para avanzar en materia tecnológica.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores recorren el mundo en busca de evidencias para determinar si la vida en la Tierra comenzó en el espacio y si la raza humana en la antigüedad recibió ayuda extraterrestre para avanzar en materia tecnológica.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: La Antártida podría ser la base para los visitantes extraterrestres en la Tierra, pero a medida que aumenta la exploración humana del continente congelado, podría encontrarse las ruinas de una antigua civilización avanzada bajo el hielo.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Imágenes satelitales revelan la aparición de una cara gigante que parece estar tallada en la Tierra en Alberta, Canadá.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Arqueólogos y antropólogos hacen descubrimientos que no reciben atención, porque no encajan en el paradigma científico aceptado, como un martillo antiguo encontrado en Texas o cráneos alargados encontrados en casi todos los continentes.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores sugieren que el antiguo sitio de Teotihuacan en México central fue hogar a una civilización altamente avanzada, quizás extraterrestre; excavaciones en Teotihuacan han desenterrado descubrimientos fuera de lugar en el mundo antiguo.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Investigadores encuentran que decenas de sitios megalíticos en todo el mundo fueron diseñados para emanar la misma frecuencia exacta, lo que les hace especular que ciertas frecuencias pueden permitir a los humanos conectarse con fuerzas alienígenas.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales

programme.title: Suburban Swingers Club
programme.desc: A young married couple make a huge mistake by agreeing to participate in a secret swingers' party in their suburban neighborhood, and soon both of them are being targeted by a jealous and homicidal neighbor.

programme.title: Locked in My House
programme.desc: Seeking justice against a doctor, a vengeful woman traps him in her basement until she can find the evidence she needs to lock him away. However, when her friend kidnaps him with the intent of killing him, she must save the very person who hurt her.

programme.title: Held Hostage in My House
programme.desc: A single mother wakes up to find herself hogtied and held captive at her country vacation rental by an unknown assailant. She must piece together clues from the previous guests to find out who is behind this.

programme.title: You Can Never Go Home Again
programme.desc: After Izzy moves with her family back to her husband's hometown, she discovers their daughter's teacher, Emma, has an obsession with her life and a lust for her husband. After seducing Izzy's husband, Emma will stop at nothing to get what she craves.

programme.title: Lethal Desire
programme.desc: When Ava and Julien discover that new neighbors Mackenzie and Theo are swingers, they decide to try out the lifestyle to spice up their failing marriage However, when Theo turns up dead, Ava becomes the prime suspect in his murder.

programme.title: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Zoe becomes the prime suspect when she wakes up to find her husband murdered beside her in bed. To clear her name, she must find the real killer before they can finish what they started.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A murder investigation in her hometown triggers deep-seated emotions in an Ohio police chief (Neve Campbell) who came from the Amish community.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: A pregnant teen (AJ Michalka) must decide whether to marry her boyfriend and stay in Amish country or reunite with the father (Jesse McCartney) of her child in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Amish Abduction
programme.desc: Annie faces a crisis when her husband leaves their Amish world to live among regular Americans. Things turn even more dire when her husband returns to seek custody of their son and is willing to do whatever it takes to get what he wants.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly, a local college student, develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a twisted turn when Abram refuses to return home and takes Carly captive so they can be together forever.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A typhoon brings monstrous waves and high winds to the west; Rick and Bob attempt to stitch a head wound in turbulent seas; John risks capsize to make a harbor entrance; an emergency tests Jake between his duties as captain and man of the house.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A brutal knife injury on the Northwestern leaves Sig scrambling; after one crewman quits, tensions explode on the Confidence until even the co-captain revolts; the Wizard faces a nightmarish mechanical failure when Keith's throttle fails in the seas.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: In California, Freddy and Juan rescue their first-ever hard rock operation; as stakes heat up with big fixes, Freddy makes a million-dollar discovery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: When Freddy and Juan get an SOS from an Oregon couple's mine, they must unravel an underground mystery buried beneath a dried riverbed; facing misleading dredge tailings and a faulty homemade wash plant, the guys call in all-new tech as a final hope.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: An all-female mine crew in Arizona struggles to mine for legendary riches with recycled water; as temps soar, Freddy and Juan scramble to build more efficient solutions and locate higher-grade gold in an attempt to triple the women's production.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: A BC miner fights to set up a legacy mine for his son, located beside the gold-rich Fraser River; Freddy and Juan resurrect a boneyard shaker and Franken-build an entire wash plant to triple production, saving a father's dream.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Tony spends millions on a new piece of ground for Mike; Parker buys a Golden Goose to turn the season around; Kevin struggles with a recent hire.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Rick returns to Vegas and gets a proposition from Parker; Tony hunts for missed gold in the Hester Cut; Parker's crew loses a truck at the worst time.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Parker brings Sluicifer out of retirement for a big week. Rick prays that Vegas Valley still pays out big. Kevin staffs up for the final push.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Tony guns for over 1,000 ounces in one week; Parker buys a new toy to open even more ground; Rick's crew burns through pay following a hot streak.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew probes COVID-19's origin from all angles; using intelligence tradecraft, expert interviews, and real-world analysis, he investigates natural spillover, lab-related, and accidental release theories, and what he uncovers is shocking.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh searches for a top-secret WWII seaplane that crashed into the Pacific; now, 70 years later, Josh joins a team scouring the ocean floor hundreds of feet below to find a lost aviation treasure -- the only XP5Y-1 still in existence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh investigates America's daring response to Pearl Harbor, which destroyed a vital Japanese base in the South Pacific; using brand-new intel, Josh dives in with Project Recover to find 40 planes and 200 American heroes lost in Operation Hailstone.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: Finding the Lost Pilots of WW2
programme.desc: Josh dives deep into the Navy's Pearl Harbor counterattack, uncovering an eyewitness who shares details of American soldiers' executions; new intel leads to the discovery of the first U.S. plane ever found from this battle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: Lost Bomber of World War II
programme.desc: Weeks before the D-Day invasion, Britain's Barracuda bomber took out the largest Nazi warship ever built, but today, not a single Barracuda exists; Josh joins a one-of-a-kind restoration project and searches for wreckage far above the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Hot on the trail of a stolen fortune, Josh chases the treasure of the infamous Spanish pirate Amaro Pargo; an exhaustive hunt of Pargo's stomping grounds in the Canary Islands leads Josh beneath an active volcano to dive for the pirate's hoard.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Searching a city of the dead, Josh unearths artifacts from the Etruscans who ruled central Italy before being conquered by the Roman Empire; a dig site unearths clues that reveal the Etruscans may have inspired Rome's greatest achievements.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates goes on a worldwide search for one of aviation's most famous lost planes; just before Lindbergh made history, two rivals attempted a Paris to New York trans-Atlantic flight.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the infamous Billy the Kid may have lived to old age under an assumed name; modern scholars explore the true identity of the "Man in the Iron Mask."

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates looks closely at some of history's most intriguing hoaxes and unexplained events, including the Amityville Horror, the strange fate of a military submarine crew, and a phenomenon in which people's body fat causes them to burn alive.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: A real-life child whose possession inspired "The Exorcist"; a con artist leaves a trail of deception and perhaps, even murder; an ancient army is defeated by hallucinogenic honey; these three stories prove that truth can outmatch fiction.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed; the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside, and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: We don't yet know where the edge of the universe is or what happens there; but thanks to cutting-edge technology and new discoveries, experts might finally reveal the secrets of the phenomena.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born; using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on Earth.
